hero.headline: Senior Full-Stack Developer
hero.subtitle: Building scalable SaaS and web applications

about.title: About
about.description: I am a senior full-stack developer with over 8 years of experience building scalable web applications and SaaS platforms. Based in Montreal, I am an entrepreneur with a Quebec INC (9550-8644 Québec inc) located at 10342 rue Clark, H3L 2S2 Montréal, and a Delaware LLC, focusing on delivering high-quality software solutions.

fullStack.title: Full-Stack Web Development
fullStack.description: End-to-end development with PHP/Symfony and React, delivering robust and scalable web applications.

saas.title: SaaS Product Architecture & Development
saas.description: Architecting and building complete SaaS platforms, from initial concept to production deployment.

consulting.title: Technical Consulting & Code Review
consulting.description: Expert guidance on architecture decisions, performance optimization, and comprehensive code reviews.

api.title: API Design & Integration
api.description: Designing robust RESTful APIs and integrating third-party services for seamless data flow.

devops.title: DevOps & Infrastructure Setup
devops.description: Setting up CI/CD pipelines, Docker containers, and scalable cloud infrastructure.

projects.title: Recent Projects
projects.subtitle: A selection of products I've built and shipped.

reviewpulse.description: A SaaS platform for Google Reviews management, helping businesses monitor, analyze, and respond to customer reviews efficiently. Built from scratch with Symfony + React.

smartinbox.description: A smart Gmail inbox cleaner that analyzes your inbox, identifies clutter, and deletes emails in bulk — with free and premium tiers. Built with Symfony, Google API, and Stripe.

reviewPulse.title: ReviewPulse AI
reviewPulse.description: A SaaS platform for Google Reviews management, helping businesses monitor, analyze, and respond to customer reviews efficiently.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's talk.
contact.hint: Prefer a chat? Reach out anytime — I typically respond within 24h.

chat.title: Mohamed's AI Assistant
chat.greeting: Hi! I'm Mohamed's AI assistant. I can tell you about his skills, services, availability, and help you get in touch. How can I help?
